origin.source: Constructed from current parser array and table behavior in server/index.ts.

fixtures.description: Empty arrays and empty tables remain explicit values rather than missing data.

server/index.ts returns empty arrays and tables when open and close markers are adjacent.
notes: Later mapping tests should preserve explicit empty collection values.
